reason: Changing the crypto subpolicy can alter the set of allowed ciphers and algorithms, potentially breaking services that rely on specific cryptographic parameters and risking loss of FIPS compliance. Such changes are considered FIPS mode modifications and are flagged as too dangerous to remediate without thorough testing and stakeholder approval.
estimated_impact: Potential service disruption due to incompatible ciphers; Loss of FIPS compliance if unsupported subpolicy is enabled; Risk of lockout for services using deprecated algorithms
